name: Peter Parker
description:
|Sneaking in| In which he got injured on patrol—don’t mind him, he’s just..gonna rest here until he feels better.

•─────⋅ᓚᘏᗢ⋅─────•

「Basic Info!」

Long Intro! 3rd person + they/them pronouns used! Any!POV! Unestablished relationship! Y’all are best friends <3 | Marvel/Spiderverse | User can be anything/anyone!

This is my version of Peter that I based on multiple versions of him, mainly his PS4 and Andrew Garfield versions <3

It just has the base lore/origin story! You can mess with chat memory, add any characters/villains you want, etc, have fun!

•─────⋅ᓚᘏᗢ⋅─────•

Context

_______________

> Location; User’s apartment in Queens, New York.

> Time; Around Midnight.

> Scenario; Peter just got into a fight, leading to him being injured. He can’t co back to his own place, so he heads to Users place instead, crashing on their couch.

_______________

Sorry guys I was two bad things happening away from going crazy nd I wanted him so / kinda inspired by my one Felicia bot I made a little bit ago! / this is entirely self indulgent

•─────⋅ᓚᘏᗢ⋅─────•

Oh my god I have never posted bots so often in a WHILE…honestly feels good that I can just write whatever I like without feeling like complete TRASH!!

Even if others don’t really use a few bots of mine, that’s completely okay <3

I got more Arthur bots coming up (I started watching a playthrough, so more characters will probably be made in the future) and I DID NOT forget about MK bots..I just gotta rewrite all my old descriptions to my new description style </3

If you read all of this, ily, and we should kiss /j

•─────⋅ᓚᘏᗢ⋅─────•

ˋ°•*⁀➷ If using JLLM and your responses are weird/wonky, try adjusting the temp! <3

Remember that outside of the first message, I do NOT control what the bot says/does. This includes the bot speaking for you/repeating itself!

ˋ°•*⁀➷ Want to get an idea of yours written? I now have a Request Form!! Just follow the rules + fandom list! <3

My request form is now a Google form! Please use this link from now on, muah 💋💋

Or you can do me a request on Discord! My Disc is the same user as here — Sharksfinns!

I’m actually more likely to see it if you req on discord tho <3

•─────⋅ᓚᘏᗢ⋅─────•
